items.title_en: Elon Musk speaks exclusively to CNBC about Grok, Tesla and the SpaceX IPO: Live updates
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 接受 CNBC 专访，谈论 Grok、特斯拉和 SpaceX IPO：实时更新
items.desc_en: Elon Musk's space and AI company SpaceX began trading on June 12 in a historic IPO that raised $85.7 billion.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的太空和人工智能公司 SpaceX 于 6 月 12 日开始交易，进行了历史性的 IPO，筹集了 857 亿美元。

items.title_en: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading as crypto exchanges evolve beyond crypto
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币交易所的发展超越了加密货币，Kraken 正在围绕代理交易重建其应用程序

items.desc_zh: Kraken 独家向 CNBC 透露，该公司正在围绕代理交易重建其应用程序。

items.title_en: Meta's stock heads for best week since early 2024 as optimism builds around AI strategy
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能战略的乐观情绪增强，Meta 的股价将迎来 2024 年初以来最好的一周
items.desc_en: Meta released two AI models this week as part of its new Muse Spark family, under the leadership of Alexandr Wang.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周在 Alexandr Wang 的领导下发布了两款人工智能模型，作为其新 Muse Spark 系列的一部分。

items.title_en: Nolan Wells' family demands answers about US teen's death after boating trip
items.title_zh: 诺兰·威尔斯的家人要求美国青少年在划船旅行后死亡一事得到答复
items.desc_en: Wells' body was found in the water near Mississippi's Horn Island days after he went on a boating trip there with friends.
items.desc_zh: 威尔斯的尸体在密西西比州霍恩岛附近的水中被发现，几天前他与朋友一起划船旅行。

items.title_en: Private chef salaries reach $300,000 as the rich seek their own Michelin stars
items.title_zh: 随着富人寻求自己的米其林星级，私人厨师的薪水达到30万美元

items.title_en: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 12%
items.title_zh: 稳定币发行人 Circle 刚刚获得银行运营许可。股价上涨12%
items.desc_en: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.
items.desc_zh: 在美国货币监理署批准其作为信托银行运营后，稳定币发行商 Circle 在盘前交易中飙升。

items.title_en: Man 'nearly sucked out of window mid-air' on Ryanair plane, passengers say
items.title_zh: 乘客称瑞安航空飞机上男子“差点被吸出窗外”
items.desc_en: Ryanair confirm a passenger was given medical treatment after an incident on a Malta Air flight, which is owned by Ryanair.
items.desc_zh: 瑞安航空证实，瑞安航空旗下马耳他航空航班发生事故后，一名乘客接受了治疗。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Delta expects higher airfare to last, bringing 2026 profit goal in reach, CEO says
items.title_zh: 达美航空首席执行官表示，预计更高的机票价格将持续下去，从而实现 2026 年的利润目标
items.desc_en: Delta is the first of the U.S. airlines to report second-quarter results.
items.desc_zh: 达美航空是第一家公布第二季度业绩的美国航空公司。

items.title_en: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs
items.title_zh: Meta 被发现因“令人上瘾”的 Instagram 和 Facebook 设计违反了欧盟法律
items.desc_en: Instagram and Facebook's "addictive" designs have put Meta in breach of the European Union's digital laws, the EU concluded Friday in a preliminary report.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟周五在一份初步报告中得出结论，Instagram 和 Facebook 的“令人上瘾”的设计使 Meta 违反了欧盟的数字法。

items.title_en: East Asia braces for destructive typhoon as landslides kill 15 in Philippines

items.desc_en: Headed for Taiwan and south-eastern China, the 1,000 km-wide Bavi is forecast to be one of the strongest storms in decades.
items.desc_zh: 宽达 1,000 公里的巴威预计将前往台湾和中国东南部，成为数十年来最强的风暴之一。

items.title_en: South Korean chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in US share sale
items.title_zh: 韩国芯片巨头 SK 海力士在美国出售股票筹集 265 亿美元

items.desc_zh: 在芯片制造商股价上涨和油价下跌之后，华尔街迎来了胜利的一天。

items.title_en: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示停火“结束”后，美国将继续与伊朗进行“技术谈判”
items.desc_en: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.
items.desc_zh: 由于美国和伊朗军队本周连续几天交锋，上个月签署的停火协议最近几天受到严重压力。

items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Huge crowds in Mashhad as Iran's late supreme leader is buried
items.title_zh: 伊朗已故最高领导人下葬时，马什哈德聚集了大批人群
items.desc_en: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.
items.desc_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊被安葬在伊朗最神圣的什叶派穆斯林圣地伊玛目礼萨圣地，结束了为期六天的公众哀悼仪式。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.title_en: How an app in South Korea will let victims track their stalkers
items.title_zh: 韩国的一款应用程序如何让受害者追踪跟踪者
items.desc_en: Officials say the app will help stalking victims, but some experts question the impact it might have.
items.desc_zh: 官员们表示，该应用程序将有助于跟踪受害者，但一些专家质疑它可能产生的影响。

items.title_en: RepStandard
items.title_zh: RepStandard
items.desc_en: Computer vision counts your reps in real time
items.desc_zh: 计算机视觉实时计算您的次数

items.title_en: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人哀悼在以色列袭击中丧生的加沙世界杯放映组织者
items.desc_en: Aid worker Mohammed al-Wahidi had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war.
items.desc_zh: 援助工作者穆罕默德·瓦希迪在以色列-哈马斯战争期间成为了一位杰出的人道主义人物。

items.title_en: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
items.title_zh: 被指控谋杀摩纳哥炸弹嫌疑人的乌克兰特工改变了故事
items.desc_en: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.
items.desc_zh: 两名与乌克兰安全部门有联系的男子被指控杀害阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡并将她的尸体扔在树林里。

items.title_en: Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
items.title_zh: 希腊F-16战斗机在繁忙的扎金索斯机场迫降
items.desc_en: The runway is closed after the jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，这架飞机在没有展开起落架的情况下着陆并起火，导致跑道关闭。

items.title_en: Ex-Olympian pleads not guilty to Reflecting Pool vandalism charges
items.title_zh: 前奥运选手对倒影池破坏行为指控不认罪
items.desc_en: A former US Olympian canoeist denies accusations that he deliberately damaged the lining of the refurbished Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
items.desc_zh: 一名前美国奥林匹克皮划艇运动员否认了有关他故意损坏翻新的林肯纪念堂倒影池内衬的指控。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在克里米亚附近袭击俄罗斯船只，对燃料供应的袭击升级
items.desc_en: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
items.desc_zh: 这些袭击似乎是乌克兰试图切断进出被占领克里米亚的供应和路线的最新阶段。

items.title_en: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.title_zh: 民主党人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳因袭击指控而暂停美国参议院关键竞选活动
items.desc_en: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".
items.desc_zh: 这一决定是在一名妇女指控他性侵犯几天后做出的，他说这一指控“绝对是错误的”。

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_zh: GPT-Live
items.desc_en: Full-duplex voice for ChatGPT
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 的全双工语音

items.title_en: Outcry as Meta lets users make AI images from public Instagram profile pics
items.title_zh: Meta 允许用户从公开的 Instagram 个人资料照片制作人工智能图像，引起强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。

items.desc_en: Open-source workspace for AI agents and workflows
items.desc_zh: AI 代理和工作流程的开源工作区

items.desc_en: AI with a visual and interactive interface
items.desc_zh: 具有视觉和交互界面的人工智能

items.title_zh: Constellation Gate AI
items.desc_en: Prompt injection and token savings - #1 in benchmarks
items.desc_zh: 即时注入和代币节省 - 基准测试中排名第一

items.title_zh: Just Ask by SEORCE
items.desc_en: Talk to your SEO & AI Visibility data on WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 在 WhatsApp 上查看您的 SEO 和 AI 可见性数据。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The impact screen time is having on younger children.
items.desc_zh: 屏幕时间对年幼的孩子有影响。

items.title_en: Juicy
items.title_zh: Juicy
items.desc_en: Beautiful Mac battery alerts, health insights & charge limit
items.desc_zh: 精美的 Mac 电池警报、健康洞察和充电限制

items.title_en: Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
items.title_zh: 可供出租的机器人：但它们能做什么？
items.desc_en: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.
items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_en: Opper AI
items.title_zh: Opper AI
items.desc_en: The european AI gateway for agents
items.desc_zh: 欧洲代理商人工智能网关

items.title_en: Yasmine Works
items.title_zh: Yasmine Works
items.desc_en: An AI coworker that lives in your Slack to get work done
items.desc_zh: 一位人工智能同事住在你的 Slack 中来完成工作

items.title_en: PlugThis
items.title_zh: PlugThis
items.desc_en: Like Lovable, but for Chrome extensions
items.desc_zh: 与 Lovable 类似，但适用于 Chrome 扩展

items.title_en: Scarlett.
items.title_zh: Scarlett.
items.desc_en: Your AI Co-Worker in Slack & iMessage.
items.desc_zh: 您在 Slack 和 iMessage 中的人工智能同事。

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_zh: ConnectMachine 2.0

items.desc_zh: 记住你遇到的每个人的人工智能数字名片
